goal: Select the first bounded v8.0 direction after v7.9 externalization readiness.
risk: AOF could jump directly to external provider automation without first governing external resources, permissions, freshness, availability, approval, provenance, and not-proven boundaries.
loss_boundary: No v8.0 implementation task should open unless Council approves a bounded direction that excludes autonomous external writes, secrets, billing, deploy, production operations, and semantic truth claims.
acceptance_gates: Visionary Builder Guardian role outputs exist
direction review states explicit boundaries and first implementation slice
evidence_plan: direction review role outputs team output Council review and follow-up TASK-100
stop_conditions: stop if v8.0 direction claims autonomous provider execution
stop if the first slice lacks auditable resource/use artifacts
notes: Direction readiness record for TASK-099; implementation readiness is represented by TASK-100.
